Hero.headline:
Hyemin Kim,
Agile UX Designer.
Hero.description: 5+ years of structured UX/UI experience across B2B LaaS, consumer electronics, and automotive HMI — building design systems, conducting user research, and collaborating globally to raise product quality.

domain.title: Domain Versatility
domain.desc: Drawing on UX/UI experience across distinct domains — B2B SaaS (logistics), consumer electronics, and automotive HMI — I adapt quickly to different user contexts and business goals to define the right design direction.

data.title: Data-Driven Design
data.desc: I combine qualitative methods like user interviews and heuristic evaluations with usage data analysis to validate hypotheses and build evidence-based UX strategies — translating findings into shareable insights for the team.

ai.title: AI-Powered Workflow
ai.desc: I actively integrate generative AI into the design process to reduce repetitive work and boost productivity in mockup creation, documentation, and asset generation — exploring how AI tools can embed into the entire team's workflow.

production.title: Production & Guidelines
production.desc: I write design guides and spec documents that account for real development constraints, ensuring design intent is delivered consistently to the final product. I have hands-on experience building design systems and defining components.

collab.title: Collaborative Communication
collab.desc: I collaborate actively with engineering, planning, and marketing teams — explaining design intent in the language of each stakeholder. I take a proactive role in defining how design contributes to shared goals.

ContactSection.headline: Let's build together.
ContactSection.available: Feel free to reach out via email.

Work.title: Work
Work.projectsDescription: UX/UI planning and design projects across various domains.
Work.artworkDescription: Images and videos created with AI for use in real-world projects.
Work.servicesDescription: Services that attempt to solve real user problems using AI agents.
Work.privateNote: Content is private due to security constraints.

m8.title: M8
m8.subtitle:
New Massage Chair UX/UI
Focusing on distraction-free relaxation
m8.description: Focused on the essence of rest by removing all elements that cause 'control fatigue'. Identified physical and cognitive barriers through data from 300 users and established intuitive PUI.

sauna.title: Sauna Booth
sauna.subtitle:
Personalized Immersion Experience
1-person sauna booth UX/UI based on behavior & bio-signals
sauna.description: Shifted from functional roles to emotional immersion strategies using confined space. Enhanced usability with context-aware touchpoints and AI-generated media.
sauna.roles: Product Planning (70%), UX Planning (100%), Content Creation, UI Design (100%), Motion Graphics (50%), QA (100%)

ev.title: EV Charging
ev.subtitle:
Smart Mobility Service
Enhancing positive perception of EV charging experience
ev.description: Structured EV charging pain points through observation and surveys. Designed integrated solutions for info overload and standby transitions based on IVI systems.

taste.title: Taste Platform
taste.subtitle:
Matching Community Service
Finding the perfect taste and community for users
taste.description: Structured community participation journeys into before/during/after phases. Designed scenarios covering AI retrospectives and personalized recommendations.

sds.title: H9 / Samsung SDS
sds.subtitle:
Logistics Platform (LaaS) Fulfillment Service
UX/UI Design
sds.description: A logistics platform project balancing operator and shipper requirements on a unified data structure. (Content is private due to security and ongoing development.)

AIArtwork.title: AI Artwork
AIArtwork.description: Artistic experiments and design explorations created with AI tools.

AISites.title: AI Service
AISites.description: Services that attempt to solve real user problems using AI agents.

chartstory.name: ChartStory
chartstory.description: To overcome the limitations of static charts in explaining data context, I designed and deployed an intelligent data reporting service that combines real-time AI data analysis with interactive storytelling.

vibecodingskillset.name: Vibe Coding Skillset
vibecodingskillset.description: To reduce the high cognitive cost of acquiring fragmented technical information, I built a knowledge-sharing platform that provides AI-curated core knowledge and immediately applicable assets.
